violations.text: Food items prepared on site and portioned from bulk were observed not marked with the date of preparation. Ready-to-eat time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods prepared/portioned in the establishment and held for more than 24 hours must be marked with the date of preparation. New Violation. Correct By: 05/18/2026

At the time of inspection, the dish machine was observed with an Out of Order sign. Per the PIC, all dishes/utensils are to be washed in the 2-bay sink per the Variance approved by RIDOH CFP. Per the PIC, service is scheduled for repairs. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 05/18/2026

Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (can opener) were observed with an food debris. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. PIC relocated can opener to dish area. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 04/15/2025

Spray chemical bottles were stored on hand sink. Chemicals must be stored to prevent the contamination of clean equipment, utensils linens, and/or single service by spacing or partitioning and locating them in an area that is not above food, equipment utensils, linens, and single service articles. PIC relocated chemical spray bottles to designated area. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 04/15/2025
Cleaned and sanitized equipment and utensils are not stored inverted. Proper storage of clean equipment discussed at time of inspection. New Violation. Correct By: 04/15/2025
The hot water control handle to hand sink is in need of repair/adjustment. Observed worn/stripped hot water control handle. New Violation. Correct By: 04/29/2025

The ceiling in the kitchen area is covered with tiles that are not smooth, durable, nonabsorbent and easily cleanable. Ceiling tiles to be replaced with smooth, durable, nonabsorbent and easily cleanable. New Violation. Correct By: 04/15/2026
